nasb.text: At the doorway of the tent of meeting, moreover, you shall remain day and night for seven days and keep the charge of the Lord, so that you will not die, for so I have been commanded.”

esv.text: At the entrance of the tent of meeting you shall remain day and night for seven days, performing what the Lord has charged, so that you do not die, for so I have been commanded.”

cnv.text: 七天之內，你們晝夜都住在會幕門口，遵守耶和華的吩咐，免得你們死亡，因為耶和華是這樣吩咐我。”

ccb.text: 七天之内，你们必须日夜待在会幕门口，要遵守耶和华的吩咐，免得你们死亡。这是耶和华对我的吩咐。”
